title: Sium burchellii
taxonomy: Sium burchellii is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, commonly known as the carrot or parsley family. It is native to southern Africa and is often found in wetlands or along streams. The plant belongs to the genus Sium, which includes several species of aquatic plants. The genus Sium is part of the larger family Apiaceae, which contains a diverse range of plants. Sium burchellii is a relatively rare and lesser-known species within the Apiaceae family.
